\- \[AI Agent Course: Free Online Training\](https://www.salesforce.com/agentforce/ai-agent-course/): Explore AI agent courses designed to enhance your skills in artificial intelligence and machine learning. Start learning with free online training today.

evidence.content:
- ### General Information

- ### Required Cookies

- ### Functional Cookies

- ### Advertising Cookies

We use three kinds of cookies on our websites: required, functional, and advertising. You can choose whether functional and advertising cookies apply. Click on the different cookie categories to find out more about each category and to change the default settings.


[Privacy Statement](https://www.salesforce.com/company/privacy/full_privacy/)

Always Active

Required cookies are necessary for basic website functionality. Some examples include: session cookies needed to transmit the website, authentication cookies, and security cookies.

Cookies Details

Functional Cookies

Functional cookies enhance functions, performance, and services on the website. Some examples include: cookies used to analyze site traffic, cookies used for market research, and cookies used to display advertising that is not directed to a particular individual.

Cookies Details

Advertising Cookies

Advertising cookies track activity across websites in order to understand a viewer’s interests, and direct them specific marketing. Some examples include: cookies used for remarketing, or interest-based advertising.

Cookies Details

Back Button

evidence.content:
Monitor your flex credits consumption in near real time, with Agentforce usage transparency powered by Digital Wallet. Track your usage, get proactive threshold alerts, and see actionable usage trends and insights. It’s all in one place, so you can make smarter investment decisions.

[Learn more](https://www.salesforce.com/agentforce/digital-wallet/)

![](https://wp.sfdcdigital.com/en-us/wp-content/uploads/sites/4/2024/08/play.svg)

Take a closer look at how agent building works in our library.

[Watch demos](https://www.salesforce.com/form/agentforce/demo/?d=pb)

![](https://wp.sfdcdigital.com/en-us/wp-content/uploads/sites/4/2024/08/groups.svg)

Launch Agentforce with speed, confidence, and ROI you can measure.

[See how](https://www.salesforce.com/en-us/wp-content/uploads/sites/4/documents/datasheets/agentforce-phase-0-datasheet.pdf)

![](https://wp.sfdcdigital.com/en-us/wp-content/uploads/sites/4/2024/08/call.svg)

Tell us about your business needs, and we’ll help you find answers.

[Contact us](https://www.salesforce.com/form/agentforce/contact-us/?d=pb)

![](https://wp.sfdcdigital.com/en-us/wp-content/uploads/sites/4/2024/10/contact-us-background-contour-min.png?w=1024)

Flex Credits offer the most flexibility and scalability. Conversations offer flat-pricing, while Flex Credits align cost to value. Conversations are optimized for external facing customer agents, while Flex Credits scale across any Agentforce use case. While Conversation consumption will be viewable in [Digital Wallet](https://www.salesforce.com/agentforce/digital-wallet/), Flex Credits in Digital Wallet will offer more granular usage data for the greatest insight and transparency. Flex Credits will offer additional flexibility with a choice of buying model options. Contact your Account Executive to learn more about what model might work best for your business and use case.
evidence.section_path: Salesforce Foundations > Flex Credits > How do I know if Flex Credits or Conversation pricing is the right model for my business?

evidence.page_title: Salesforce Agentforce Pricing | Salesforce
evidence.content:
No. Flex Credits and Conversations will not be supported in the same org.

Unused Flex Credits do not roll over into subsequent subscription terms. Work with your Account Executive to strategize on next steps.

Yes. If you would like to do so to take advantage of the flexibility that Flex Credits offer, you will need to swap all of your existing Agentforce Conversation SKUs. Speak with your Account Executive to learn more about the process.

Digital Wallet will be automatically provided for free for any customers who have Digital Wallet enabled products. Digital Wallet supports all products sold with usage-based metrics. For Flex Credits, Digital Wallet will provide more granular usage insights and analytics.

There is no overage penalty. If you exceed your entitlement, your rate is your contracted rate billed monthly in arrears. Prevent overages by using alerts in Digital Wallet.

Flex Credits are available for purchase with PayGo and Pre-Commit models. Conversation-based pricing, Agentforce add-ons and Agentforce 1 Editions are not available with these models.

For all Agentforce actions, Flex Credits scale up and down with usage to align cost to value. Usage types and multipliers differ for Agentforce Voice actions. See the [Agentforce Rate Card](https://www.salesforce.com/agentforce/rates/) for more detail.

[Call Us](tel:18006649073)

evidence.page_title: Enterprise Vibe Coding – Agentforce Vibes | Salesforce
evidence.content:
Build confidently with built-in security and governance on the Headless 360 platform. Your codebase, schema, and metadata stay protected within the Agentforce Trust Layer while rules enforce consistent standards and project-specific best practices.

![Has one box at the top with an example of Global Rules and another box below with Workspace Rules.](https://wp.sfdcdigital.com/en-us/wp-content/uploads/sites/4/2026/04/capability-b-feature-4-Built-in-Security-Trust720x720.png?w=1024)

Transform ideas into contextual and structured code using natural language. Streamline your projects with agentic AI that plans, codes, and tests new features, integrations, agents, and entire apps that are secure, standardized, and customizable. Empower developers of all levels, enhancing and accelerating application lifecycles and project timelines.

![Shows a set of instructions in natural language and below it has where Agentforce Vibes provides back the code.](https://wp.sfdcdigital.com/en-us/wp-content/uploads/sites/4/2026/04/capability-a-feature-1-Natural-Language-to-Code-720x720-1.png?w=1024)

Dynamically activate the right context and markdown instructions based on user intent, guiding Agentforce through development tasks with speed and precision—so teams build faster, with higher-quality results.

![Abilities and Skills](https://wp.sfdcdigital.com/en-us/wp-content/uploads/sites/4/2026/04/capability-a-feature-2-Abilities-and-Skills-720x720-1.png?w=1024)

Purpose-built for Salesforce, Agentforce Vibes unleashes developer productivity with the power of agentic AI.

Agentforce Vibes enables developers of any skill level to “vibe code” agents and apps on the Headless 360 platform at lightning speed. Create context-aware development plans, write code, and generate test cases with the help of an AI-powered dev agent.

Businesses can accelerate innovation by adopting generative AI for developers, dramatically shortening development cycles. With Agentforce Vibes, teams can innovate up to 95% faster, reduce IT backlog, and build higher-quality applications—all while benefiting from built-in guardrails that ensure enterprise-grade security and governance.

Salesforce is the [**#1 AI CRM**](https://www.salesforce.com/crm/worlds-number-one-crm/) (customer relationship management) platform. We bring companies and customers together by providing a unified set of applications — powered by [agentic AI](https://www.salesforce.com/agentforce/what-is-agentic-ai/) and data — that help every department, including sales, service, marketing, commerce, and IT, work as one. You can learn more about [what Salesforce is](https://www.salesforce.com/products/what-is-salesforce/) and [what Salesforce does](https://www.salesforce.com/blog/what-does-salesforce-do/) by visiting [our official resources](https://www.salesforce.com/company/our-story/). evidence.page_title: Salesforce: The #1 Agentic AI CRM | Salesforce
evidence.content:
Salesforce offers agentic CRM solutions tailored for companies of all sizes, from [startups and small businesses](https://www.salesforce.com/small-business/) to large global enterprises. Our Headless 360 platform is **flexible** and **scalable**, allowing you to start with the essentials you need — like sales, service, commerce, or marketing — and easily add more functionality as your business grows. This ensures you only pay for what you use and have an [AI and CRM](https://www.salesforce.com/crm/ai-crm/) platform that can grow with your business.

[Salesforce Starter](https://www.salesforce.com/small-business/starter/) helps you hit the ground running for free, providing an all-in-one suite of sales, service, and marketing tools designed specifically for small business needs. The setup process is simple so you can focus on building customer relationships immediately, with the peace of mind that the full power of the Salesforce ecosystem is ready whenever you are.

[Call Us](tel:18006649073)

evidence.content:
Create stunning standalone or embedded React apps with a real-time “see as you build” experience, instantly visualizing every change to your UI and data model as you make it.

![Home screen of the React app welcoming a customer David to the app. ](https://wp.sfdcdigital.com/en-us/wp-content/uploads/sites/4/2026/04/capability-b-feature-1-React-App-Generation-720x720-1.png?w=1024)

Build faster with real-time inline code suggested within [Agentforce Vibes IDE](https://www.salesforce.com/agentforce/developers/vibe-coding/ide/) and VS Code. Write higher quality code using Agentforce Vibe’s autocomplete suggestions, which consider contextual project and metadata so you can elevate your development experience, enhance coding proficiency, and reduce errors.

![Agentforce Vibes and Vibe Codey in the top left with ContactController.](https://wp.sfdcdigital.com/en-us/wp-content/uploads/sites/4/2026/04/capability-b-feature-2-Code-Autocomplete-720x720-1.png?w=1024)

Scan large amounts of code, catch potential bugs, identify runtime efficiency errors, catch security vulnerabilities early in the development process, and automatically fix them using Agentforce Vibes and Salesforce Code Analyzer. Empower your development team with actionable insights, allowing for smarter decision-making and code refinement.

![Agentforce Vibes showing a scan complete notification across File Utilities.](https://wp.sfdcdigital.com/en-us/wp-content/uploads/sites/4/2026/04/capability-b-feature-3-Code-Analyzer-Integration-720x720-1.png?w=1024)

evidence.content:
Only Agentforce Vibes is purpose-built for the Agentforce 360 Platform, uniquely trained on Salesforce coding patterns and development frameworks to deliver more accurate, reliable outputs. Built on the Agentforce Trust Layer, it ensures your code, schema, and metadata remain securely within the Agentforce Trust Boundary—so your business context is never exposed to public large language models.

It's important to select a trusted partner for AI. Trust is the #1 priority for Salesforce and that cascades into this product as well. Agentforce Trust Layer ensures your company’s code and data does not leak to the public.

**Security & trust:** Trained on open-source, consented and representative data that a customer would have rather than generic data that exists on the internet. Customer data and code never leave the Agentforce Trust Boundary. In addition, all output is assessed for toxicity, bias and harm.

**Performance and accuracy:** Our AI models are tailored specifically for Salesforce specific use cases while other non-Salesforce models are not.

**Availability & scalability:** Our AI models contain less latency issues and energy used than other open-source models.

evidence.page_title: Salesforce: The #1 Agentic AI CRM | Salesforce
evidence.content:
[**CRM**](https://www.salesforce.com/crm/what-is-crm/) stands for **customer relationship management.** It’s a technology for managing all your company’s relationships and interactions with customers and potential customers. A CRM system helps you:

**• Organize** contact information, leads, and customer service data

**• Automate** tasks like logging calls and sending follow-up emails **• Analyze** data to understand customer behavior and business performance

A CRM, especially one powered by AI like Salesforce, is essential for growth because it gives you a **single**, [**360-degree view** of every customer](https://www.salesforce.com/products/what-is-customer-360/), allowing you to build stronger, more profitable relationships at scale.

[**Agentic AI**](https://www.salesforce.com/agentforce/what-is-agentic-ai/) refers to advanced artificial intelligence systems that can act [**autonomously**](https://www.salesforce.com/agentforce/ai-agents/autonomous-agents/) to achieve a specific goal with minimal human intervention. Unlike traditional [AI](https://www.salesforce.com/artificial-intelligence/what-is-ai/) that only generates content or analyzes data, agentic AI can reason, plan multistep actions, and execute tasks.

In Salesforce, agentic AI — part of our [**Agentforce**](https://www.salesforce.com/agentforce/) technology — is used to:

**• Automate** complex workflows like lead qualification or service case resolution

**• Predict** business outcomes, such as which deals are likely to close

**• Personalize** every customer interaction across marketing, sales, and service channels
